title: Women bike riders to rev it up in Plett
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Vroom, vroom! The...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Vroom, vroom! The Women Riders World Relay (WRWR) is coming to Plett on 17 January.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Vroom, vroom! The Women Riders World Relay (WRWR) is coming to Plett on 17 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"That is when the official full throttle launch of the WRWR South Africa takes place at Slops in Main Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Colette Dart, a real estate agent with Plett Realty, was announced as South African ambassador for WRWR 2026.","html":"Colette Dart, a real estate agent with Plett Realty, was announced as South African ambassador for WRWR 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She rides locally with the HDCSA Garden Route Chapter and will be hosting the launch to kick off the global relay year.","html":"She rides locally with the HDCSA Garden Route Chapter and will be hosting the launch to kick off the global relay year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"All female riders and pillions, whether it's a road bike, off-road bike or scooter, is invited to attend the event. There are goodie bags for the first 50 ladies that register,\" said Dart.","html":"\"All female riders and pillions, whether it's a road bike, off-road bike or scooter, is invited to attend the event. There are goodie bags for the first 50 ladies that register,\" said Dart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Legacy","html":"Legacy"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In 2019, WRWR achieved something the world had never seen before. They connected more than 20 000 women from 102 countries to create the largest motorcycle relay in history.","html":"In 2019, WRWR achieved something the world had never seen before. They connected more than 20 000 women from 102 countries to create the largest motorcycle relay in history."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It wasn't just a ride - it reshaped the motorcycling landscape and ignited lifelong connections among women riders worldwide. In true WRWR style, they're now continuing the baton-passing legacy and gearing up to shake the world all over again.","html":"It wasn't just a ride - it reshaped the motorcycling landscape and ignited lifelong connections among women riders worldwide. In true WRWR style, they're now continuing the baton-passing legacy and gearing up to shake the world all over again."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Our goal is to connect every single woman rider in the world! We've engineered a tool to make it possible - the WRWR app,\" said Hayley Bell and Liza Miller, joint CEOs.","html":"\"Our goal is to connect every single woman rider in the world! We've engineered a tool to make it possible - the WRWR app,\" said Hayley Bell and Liza Miller, joint CEOs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This is not just an app - this is our key to connecting and celebrating women riders worldwide, one virtual baton pass at a time. Women globally are responding to our call and sharing our enthusiasm for this monumental challenge.\"","html":"\"This is not just an app - this is our key to connecting and celebrating women riders worldwide, one virtual baton pass at a time. Women globally are responding to our call and sharing our enthusiasm for this monumental challenge.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event provides an opportunity to meet our South African ambassador, Dart, and receive a golden baton pass that will earn riders bonus points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dart can be contacted on 083 704 4045.","html":"Dart can be contacted on 083 704 4045."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"WRWR website: www.wrwrapp.com","html":"WRWR website: www.wrwrapp.com"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Women bike riders to rev it up in Plett
